## Description of change

## Issue number

(Link to github issue you're solving)

## Type of change (delete irrelevant types)

- Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- Enhancement (update existing functionality)
- New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## Checklist:

- [ ] I have considered to add necessary posthog event for my feature
- [ ] I have tested locally and linked a screen recording with this PR
- [ ] I have adhered to clean code conventions
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] I have evaluated how the change will affect the system on broader level

## Demo

Please provide visual evidence of your changes:

- **Video recording** (preferred): Attach a screen recording showing the feature/bug fix in action
  - Show both the before and after behavior if applicable
  - Include edge cases and error handling scenarios
  - For UI changes, demonstrate the complete user flow
  - For bug fixes, show the issue being resolved

- **Screenshots**: If video is not possible, provide clear screenshots with annotations
  - Label key changes or new elements
  - Show relevant states (loading, error, success, etc.)
  - Include both iOS and Android screenshots if the change affects both platforms

**Note**: The demo should clearly demonstrate that the change works as intended and addresses the issue described above.

## Appium Test Result

- **Test Status**: ✅ Pass / ❌ Fail / ⚠️ Partial

- **Test Results**: 
  - Attach test execution logs or screenshots
  - Include any failed test cases and their resolution status
  - Note any tests that were skipped and the reason

- **Platform Coverage**:
  - [ ] iOS
  - [ ] Android

- **Additional Notes**: 
  - Any known test limitations or flaky tests
  - Tests that need to be added for future coverage
  - Performance test results if applicable

**Note**: All critical paths should have passing tests. If tests are failing, please explain why and provide a plan to fix them.
